description: A full-length self-portrait of a bearded man in a black suit and beret standing on a riverbank, holding a painter's palette and brush. Behind him, a bridge spans a river where a large ship decorated with colorful flags is moored. A hot-air balloon floats in the sky among stylized clouds. On the right, trees and a small greenhouse-like structure are visible. The style is characteristically naive with flat forms, careful detail, and a clear blue sky.

_meta.title: Self Portrait from L'ile Saint Louis
